content: Add DASHSCOPE_API_KEY + STYLIST_PROVIDER to backend/.env + config.py
Create app/services/stylist_brain.py (Qwen primary, Gemini fallback, future Gemma slot)

Update CHANGELOG.md + .env.example for Phase O Wave 1
